title: Bhānder Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Bhānder with a Z-Score of +5.20. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Bhānder has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 17.2 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems. 
 The relative humidity is at 26%, and the wind speed is 7.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat-related issues.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
